section: General
sentence: California residents, please see our California Privacy Statement and Notice at Collection in Section 11 below

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY
sentence: This Privacy Policy describes how we handle your personal information when you (“professional”, “you”, or “your”) use the Houzz Platform and your rights and choices regarding this information. By “Platform” or “Houzz Platform” we mean the Houzz, Houzz Pro, Ivy, and ConX platforms (located at houzz.com, pro.houzz.com, ivy.co, and conx.co, respectively), and any Houzz service feature, or tool that links to this Privacy Policy. The Houzz Platform also includes mobile apps, products, software, services, programs, and networks offered by Houzz, including our plug-ins and browser extensions.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY
sentence: Access to and use of our Platform is subject to this Privacy Policy. The collection of personal information of job applicants is governed by the Job Applicant Privacy Notice.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY
sentence: The terms “we,” “us,” “our,” or “Houzz” refer to the Houzz Group, including Houzz Inc. and their corporate affiliates. As of August 5, 2025, Shop Houzz is operated by Cart.com Holdings 2, LLC (“Cart” d/b/a “Shop Houzz”). Shop Houzz is responsible for managing your orders, payments, returns, and customer service. Please refer to the Privacy Policy of Cart d/b/a Shop Houzz for further details on how your personal data will be used by them and your rights regarding that data.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:1. Collection of Personal Information
sentence: The personal information we collect depends on how you choose to engage with the Platform. In general, we collect, as a data controller, personal information that you provide us, from third parties, and automatically when you use our Platform. These categories are described below.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:1. Collection of Personal Information > H3:Personal Information You Provide Us
sentence: We collect personal information that you provide us, including your account and profile information, content you submit or post to our Platform, your purchase information, your communications, and personal information you provide to us as part of promotions, surveys, and contests.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:1. Collection of Personal Information > H3:Personal Information You Provide Us
sentence: Account and Profile Information. When you create an account on our Platform, we collect your email address and other information you may choose to provide us, like your name, address, interests, and profile information. If you are a professional, you may also provide us with information related to your business, including a business name, description, phone number, and areas served. If you use financial tools or services offered through our Platform, for example, to request or accept payments for your business services, we collect information to facilitate those transactions, such as proof of business ownership, bank name, account numbers, tax numbers and other documentation as needed to verify your identity or integrate with our service providers.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:1. Collection of Personal Information > H3:Personal Information You Provide Us
sentence: Content You Submit. We collect information and content that you submit, share, or create across our Platform. This includes information and content submitted, shared, or created, including your company information, profile picture, reviews, messages, comments, searches, photos, style preferences, ideabooks, discussion, project details, project costs, project timelines, change orders, and invoices.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:1. Collection of Personal Information > H3:Personal Information You Provide Us
sentence: Purchases. If you purchase or make or receive payments within our Platform, we collect certain information to complete your purchases, sales, and payments, such as your phone number, address, and payment method (for example, credit card or bank account information).

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:1. Collection of Personal Information > H3:Personal Information You Provide Us
sentence: Communications. When you communicate with us (via email, phone, through our Platform, through our chatbots, or otherwise) and when you use our Platform to communicate with others, we may record, monitor, collect, and use details about you and your communications (including call time and call duration). Certain professionals on our Platform may choose to use our call tracking feature to better manage their business. We may assign Houzz-generated phone numbers for the purpose of communicating with others on our Platform. We will provide you notice or obtain your consent in accordance with applicable law before recording or monitoring these calls. To the extent you communicate with professionals and other users outside our Platform, those communications are not subject to this Privacy Policy.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:1. Collection of Personal Information > H3:Personal Information You Provide Us
sentence: Surveys and Contests. If you participate in our surveys, contests, or promotions, we collect the information you provide to us.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:1. Collection of Personal Information > H3:Personal Information You Provide Us
sentence: Processing with Your Consent. From time to time, Houzz may seek your consent to use your information for a particular purpose. Where you consent to doing so, we will use the information for that purpose.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:1. Collection of Personal Information > H3:Personal Information from Others
sentence: We collect information that others make available to us, including information from other platforms, publicly available information, information from other users of our Platform, information from our partners, service providers, and corporate affiliates, and information from third-party sites.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:1. Collection of Personal Information > H3:Personal Information from Others
sentence: Other Platforms. We may receive information about you from third-party platforms when you allow the third-party platform to share this information with us or allow Houzz to obtain this information from the third party. For example, we may receive information such as your name, email address, and profile photo when you sign up for our Platform through Facebook, Google, or Apple. We may also receive information about you when you upload your contacts from your third-party email service, use our Platform (or a third-party integration on our Platform) to manage your calendar on another platform, or to manage and send communications (e.g., email or text messages).

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:1. Collection of Personal Information > H3:Personal Information from Others
sentence: Publicly Available Information. If you are a professional, we may collect and verify information about you from publicly available sources and, where permitted by applicable law, make it available as part of our Platform. For example, we may receive your name and contact information from industry associations and dealer networks in which you participate and display your affiliation with these organizations. We also may collect and display the details of any license you have using publicly available records.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:1. Collection of Personal Information > H3:Personal Information from Others
sentence: Other Users and Customers. Others may post content on our Platform that includes information about you (for example, as part of photos, stories, and reviews) or provide us your information in connection with using our Platform (e.g., to manage their business, organize photoshoots of their projects, participate in referral programs, and to advertise through our Platform). To enhance the quality of our Platform, users on our Platform may provide us information about your engagement with them, including whether you have contacted them or responded to them and whether your project has been completed. If you are a professional, Platform users and visitors may provide us with feedback and public reviews about you.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:1. Collection of Personal Information > H3:Personal Information from Others
sentence: Our Partners and Service Providers. We may receive information about you from our partners and service providers. For example, our payment processors may update your payment information, advertising partners may help us send you communications, and third parties may help us prevent fraud by verifying your contact information. In addition, our financial partners that conduct "know your customer" or "know your business" (KYC or KYB) verification may provide us with information they collect directly from you. For example, they may share with us information used to verify your identity or information resulting from prescreening you for card offers.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:1. Collection of Personal Information > H3:Personal Information from Others
sentence: Houzz Group. In accordance with applicable laws and subject to this Privacy Policy and any supplemental policies, Houzz Group entities may receive information about you from other Houzz Group entities.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:1. Collection of Personal Information > H3:Personal Information from Others
sentence: Third-Party Sites. Certain third-party sites embed a Houzz plug-in, widget, or content, including through Houzz-branded buttons, badges, and slideshows and Houzz co-branded content partnerships. Our plug-ins, widgets, embedded content, and pixels may collect information pursuant to our Cookie Policy.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:1. Collection of Personal Information > H3:Personal Information from Others
sentence: Website Services. Website Services means any website displaying content included by or on behalf of you into standard Houzz web templates with hosting managed by Houzz. As with the rest of our Platform, we collect the information described in this Privacy Policy when providing Website Services, including your messages to professionals sent through those sites. Professionals collect usage information for their websites and receive your messages sent through those sites.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:1. Collection of Personal Information > H3:Automatically Collected Personal Information
sentence: Each time you access the Platform, information is sent to our server by your Internet browser or app and stored in our log files. We collect information about your use of our Platform, including your search activity, the pages you view, the date and time of your visit, and if you use our browser extensions, the content you interact with on third-party sites (for example, if you save an image from a third-party site to your Houzz account), and how you navigate and interact with a page or screen. We also collect information, such as your browser type, type of device, browser language, IP address, mobile carrier, unique device identifier, and requested and referring URLs that your device provides in connection with use of our Platform

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:1. Collection of Personal Information > H3:Automatically Collected Personal Information
sentence: Cookies and Similar Technologies. We use cookies and similar technologies in connection with your use of our Platform to collect information related to what you see and interact with on our Platform and other Platform access and use. We partner with third parties that collect information this way. These third parties place digital tracking tools on Houzz websites, applications, and advertising to facilitate tracking, advertising, and measurement services and to enable your access to the content that you have asked for. Third-party content providers may have access to information about the content you have chosen to view. Please see our Cookie Policy for more information on our use of cookies and, depending on where you reside, how to accept or opt-out of cookies

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:1. Collection of Personal Information > H3:Automatically Collected Personal Information
sentence: Location Information. You may choose to provide information such as your home, work, and project locations in our Platform, including in your Houzz Settings, Ivy or ConX settings, or when you checkout as a billing address. If you use certain Houzz Pro features and have enabled the location setting through your browser or mobile device, we may receive limited location information from your device when you are close to a location that you may have specified within the Houzz Platform. We may also infer your general location from your IP address.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:2. Use of Personal Information
sentence: We use the personal information we collect to provide, support, and personalize our Platform and to communicate with you about our Platform (on and off our Platform). We process this information to: provide and improve our Platform, its features, and functionality, including to display content you post publicly, process, store, and deliver your communications; to provide customer service and support; to respond to your inquiries or requests; to back-up our systems; and to improve the security of our Platform;

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:2. Use of Personal Information
sentence: We use the personal information we collect to provide, support, and personalize our Platform and to communicate with you about our Platform (on and off our Platform). We process this information to: evaluate use of our Platform for our business purposes and to provide and improve our products and services, including new and co-branded products and services and our Platform's functionality;

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:2. Use of Personal Information
sentence: We use the personal information we collect to provide, support, and personalize our Platform and to communicate with you about our Platform (on and off our Platform). We process this information to: personalize your experience, such as tailoring the content and information made available to you and our support services;

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:2. Use of Personal Information
sentence: We use the personal information we collect to provide, support, and personalize our Platform and to communicate with you about our Platform (on and off our Platform). We process this information to: display relevant or targeted advertising (on our Platform and third-party sites) for us and other businesses and to evaluate the success of such advertising;

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:2. Use of Personal Information
sentence: We use the personal information we collect to provide, support, and personalize our Platform and to communicate with you about our Platform (on and off our Platform). We process this information to: promote engagement with the Houzz Platform, including to get in touch with you about certain features, offers, and surveys;

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:2. Use of Personal Information
sentence: We use the personal information we collect to provide, support, and personalize our Platform and to communicate with you about our Platform (on and off our Platform). We process this information to: provide feedback to users on our Platform;

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:2. Use of Personal Information
sentence: We use the personal information we collect to provide, support, and personalize our Platform and to communicate with you about our Platform (on and off our Platform). We process this information to: communicate with you as described in our agreements with you (for example, the Houzz Terms of Use) or this Privacy Policy;

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:2. Use of Personal Information
sentence: We use the personal information we collect to provide, support, and personalize our Platform and to communicate with you about our Platform (on and off our Platform). We process this information to: prevent fraud and to maintain a quality experience for our business purposes or legal reasons, including to filter for spam and communications that violate our agreements with you (for example, the Houzz Terms of Use);

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:2. Use of Personal Information
sentence: We use the personal information we collect to provide, support, and personalize our Platform and to communicate with you about our Platform (on and off our Platform). We process this information to: enforce compliance with our agreements with you (for example, the Houzz Terms of Use) and applicable law; to comply with our legal obligations; to prosecute or defend a lawsuit, arbitration, or similar legal proceeding; to respond to lawful requests by public authorities (including national security or law enforcement requirements);

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:2. Use of Personal Information
sentence: We use the personal information we collect to provide, support, and personalize our Platform and to communicate with you about our Platform (on and off our Platform). We process this information to: perform research and analysis for our business purposes and to conduct journalist research; and

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:2. Use of Personal Information
sentence: We use the personal information we collect to provide, support, and personalize our Platform and to communicate with you about our Platform (on and off our Platform). We process this information to: award badges and similar designations and if you decide to participate, to administer surveys, contests, and promotions.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:2. Use of Personal Information
sentence: We use specific types of personal information that we may collect for the following purposes.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:2. Use of Personal Information
sentence: Contacts. If you choose to provide information about your contacts (for example, when you sign up for our Platform through Facebook), we may inform contacts with accounts on our Platform that you also have joined.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:2. Use of Personal Information
sentence: Communications. We use your communications to provide and improve the Houzz Platform. We may use your communications for quality-assurance and training. We may also use your communications to understand and help manage the quality of communications received and sent by professionals on our Platform and to provide them with feedback. We may use automated technology to communicate with you, support communications, and improve user experience.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:2. Use of Personal Information
sentence: Device and Activity Information. We use your device information, IP address, and other information we collect from cookies and similar technologies for personalization, advertising, and operating our websites. Some of the information we collect using cookies is essential to provide the Platform to you, such as helping you log in your account. Some uses of this information assist us with the performance and functionality of the Platform, such as remembering your site preferences. Other uses of this information enable us to analyze site usage and improve the Platform.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:2. Use of Personal Information
sentence: We also enable our service providers, third-party businesses advertising on our Platform, advertising networks, and advertising partners to use cookies or similar technologies to track your activities on our Platform and other online properties to provide you with tailored ads across websites, apps, and devices and to understand how those ads perform. To learn how to opt-out of cookie tracking please see our Cookie Policy.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:2. Use of Personal Information
sentence: Purchases and Payment Information. For your convenience, we and our payment processors will store information about the payment method(s) you use in connection with the Platform. While our payment processors may store your complete credit card number, Houzz does not. You can remove or change your payment method on Houzz through your Privacy Settings. You can change your credit card payment method via your Houzz or Ivy settings.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:2. Use of Personal Information
sentence: Location. With your permission, we use your location information to provide you with location-based alerts for your projects, for example, we may tell you the weather conditions or remind you to start or stop your project timers. You can stop sharing your location for these purposes at any time, by updating your device settings.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:2. Use of Personal Information
sentence: Algorithmic Processing. Certain Houzz functionalities may process various types of information by automated means including by algorithmic, machine learning, and artificial intelligence to personalize and recommend content and products for you including services for enhanced project visualization and budget assistance.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:3. Sharing Your Personal Information
sentence: We share your personal information in the following ways:

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:3. Sharing Your Personal Information > H3:Platform Visitors and Users
sentence: People create Houzz profiles to share home renovation and design ideas with others. Through Houzz, others have the ability to find, contact, view, and follow your profile and public activity on Houzz (for example, if you like content on our Platform or if you create an ideabook and do not mark it private) and link it to your username. You can customize your Houzz profile and whether users may follow you through your Houzz Settings. Your Houzz content (for example, ideabooks, photos, notes on others' photos, projects, discussions, and social media profiles), followers, and others you follow are publicly viewable on the Platform and open to comments by other Houzz users. You can make some of your content private via the Houzz settings; please click here to learn more. If you are a professional on Houzz, we may also display information to help visitors and users evaluate you. This information may include aggregated information on our Platform about your Platform activity (e.g., response rate), and information that is publicly available from third parties.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:3. Sharing Your Personal Information > H3:Professionals and Other Businesses on our Platform
sentence: Having a profile on Houzz allows you to connect with professionals and other users. You can use our Platform to find professionals for your project in which case your project and contact information will be made available to a limited number of professionals applicable to your criteria. Depending on how you use the Platform, professionals may be able to view and comment on some of your activities. If you provide Houzz with feedback about a professional, that feedback may be communicated to them. If you interact with a professional’s content, then related metadata will be communicated to the professional. When you receive messages from professionals through the Platform, Houzz and the professionals can track your interaction with these messages and phone calls, including whether you opened the messages or answered the phone call, or documents shared with these messages. A professional cannot see your non-public account information or see private activity (for example, if your ideabook is private).

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:3. Sharing Your Personal Information > H3:Service Providers and Partners
sentence: We may share your information with service providers to help us operate our Platform and provide services to you. For example, we ask third parties to help us perform payment processing, telecommunications and support, logistics, marketing and advertising, IT services, fraud detection, customer management, and analytics providers to help us understand user behavior on our Platform. We also use service providers and partners to perform services explained in our Cookie Policy. To the extent we make third-party content available on our platform, those third parties may be able to access information about the content you have chosen to view. You can find more information about our service providers and partners with which we may share your information. Depending on the privacy choices you make, we may occasionally share your personal information with specific partners that offer supplementary services to those provided by Houzz for direct marketing purposes. We may also modify outbound product or service links by appending affiliate or referral parameters in order to measure referrals and earn a commission on qualifying purchases made through those links. This process does not change the destination content available to users and is used solely for attribution and revenue purposes.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:3. Sharing Your Personal Information > H3:Service Providers and Partners
sentence: We may share information about you with third-party platforms when you allow the third-party platform to receive this information from us or allow Houzz to share this information with the third party. Our Platform may include third-party social media features and other third-party plug-ins and widgets. When these features are displayed on our Platform, they are operated or hosted by third parties. We are not responsible for these third parties and third-party platforms, so please carefully review their privacy policies and your permissions granted to these third parties and platforms. For example, you may sign-up for our Platform through Google or Apple.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:3. Sharing Your Personal Information > H3:Advertisers and Ad Networks
sentence: We use advertising networks and partners to serve advertisements for us and other businesses, including interest-based, targeted advertising, on third-party sites and to assist us in evaluating the effectiveness of our advertising. We may also work with advertising networks and partners to serve ads on our Platform and to communicate with you at the addresses they have for you. We may provide advertising networks, advertising partners, and businesses advertising on our Platform with aggregate information but other than hashed information or device identifiers, we do not disclose your name, contact information, or other personal information. For example, we may provide a hashed version of your email address or other information to advertising networks (e.g., Facebook and Google) to serve advertisements to you or others. Depending on where you live, you may have the right to opt out of the sharing of your information for this purpose, to learn how to opt out please see the Your Choices and Rights section of this Privacy Policy.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:3. Sharing Your Personal Information > H3:Corporate Affiliates and Business Transfers
sentence: We may share information from or about you with: (a) other companies in the Houzz Group, or (b) a potential or actual acquirer, successor, or assignee as part of any reorganization, merger, sale, joint venture, assignment, transfer or other disposition of all or any portion of our business, assets, or stock (including bankruptcy or similar proceedings) to another company. We may share your personal information with that company and its advisors before and after the transaction date. In the event of a sale or transfer of our business, we will notify you in the same way we notify you of a material change to this Privacy Policy.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:3. Sharing Your Personal Information > H3:Notice to Shop Houzz Customers
sentence: As of August 5, 2025, Shop Houzz is operated by Cart.com Holdings 2,d/b/a Shop Houzz (“Shop Houzz”). Shop Houzz will be responsible for managing your orders, payments, returns, and customer service. For any questions about your purchase, you can reach out to Shop Houzz through your order page.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:3. Sharing Your Personal Information > H3:Legal Obligations
sentence: We may disclose information from or about you, as required or permitted by applicable law, if we believe that such disclosure is reasonably necessary to (a) comply with legal process and law enforcement instructions and orders, such as a search warrant, subpoena, statute, judicial proceeding, or other legal process served on us, a service provider, or a partner (which may include disclosure to law enforcement, courts, or governmental authorities); (b) prevent, investigate, or identify possible wrongdoing in connection with our Platform; (c) protect our rights, reputation, property, or that of our visitors, users, corporate affiliates, or the public; or (d) enforce compliance with our agreements with you (for example, the Houzz Terms of Use).

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:4. Communications
sentence: An essential part of our Platform that you sign up for when you create an account on our Platform is to receive communications from us or our professional partners through email, phone call, and text message, or through our Platform. If you use our mobile app, these communications also include push notifications. We communicate with you about your account, privacy, use of the Platform, including interactions with your content (for example, if others "like" your ideabook, respond to your comment, or if you earn a badge on our Platform), news relating to the Platform, its features and industry developments, and communications concerning promotions run by us or third parties. We also ask for your feedback about your experience in connection with our Platform or about your home renovation and design plans. In accordance with applicable law, we or our professional partners may send you marketing communications (e.g., with tips, offers, and similar services). These communications may feature us, our Platform, co-branded products and services, professionals, and other businesses on our Platform.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:4. Communications
sentence: If you provide us your phone number, we and our professional partners may call you or send you text messages to help you with using the Platform (e.g., to discuss your home remodeling or design project, to find professionals, or if you are a professional, or to provide you tips about your professional profile). If you are a professional or other business, we may use your contact information (whether publicly available or provided to Houzz) to call and otherwise contact you about our Platform, including to market and sell our services or those available on our Platform.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:4. Communications
sentence: Our Platform also allows you and others to send messages and make calls in our Platform, share content with others outside our Platform, and if you make your contact information available, for others to contact you outside of our Platform.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:5. Your Choices and Rights
sentence: Depending on where you live and how you use our Platform, you may have certain rights relating to your personal information. Below we explain how to exercise these rights: Access to Information

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:5. Your Choices and Rights
sentence: You can ask us to confirm if we are processing your personal information, provide you with details about our processing, and access much of the information you have provided us by logging into your account. To request access to both your Houzz or Ivy information contact us as provided in the Contact Us section.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:5. Your Choices and Rights
sentence: Correct Your Information

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:5. Your Choices and Rights
sentence: You can update your information within your settings and modify content that contains information about you from your account. To edit your personal information, visit your profile in your Houzz Settings and Ivy Settings. You may also contact us about correcting or updating your personal information using the methods provided in the Contact Us section.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:5. Your Choices and Rights
sentence: Download Your Information

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:5. Your Choices and Rights
sentence: You may request to receive a copy of your Houzz information through your Houzz Settings and clicking on Download a Copy of your Data.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:5. Your Choices and Rights
sentence: Delete Your Information

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:5. Your Choices and Rights
sentence: To request permanent deletion of your personal information, please contact us as described in the Contact Us section or go to your Houzz Settings and click on Delete my Houzz Account as further outlined here.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:5. Your Choices and Rights
sentence: Communications Preferences

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:5. Your Choices and Rights
sentence: You may change your communication preferences at any time through your Houzz Settings if you have a Houzz account and your Ivy settings if you have an Ivy account, and you may also opt-out of similar types of marketing emails from us directly through the email. To opt-out of our text messages at any time, you can follow the instructions provided in the text message, which typically is to reply "STOP." You may opt-out of sales and marketing phone calls from us by letting us know during the call or by contacting us as described in the Contact Us section. Please be aware that you cannot opt-out of receiving necessary account- and privacy-related messages from us. If you wish to stop receiving push notifications from us, you can turn off push notifications for the mobile application in the settings of your mobile device.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:5. Your Choices and Rights
sentence: Opt-Out Rights

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:5. Your Choices and Rights
sentence: Where provided under your local laws, you may opt-out of having your personal information shared with third parties for targeted advertising and similar commercial purposes by visiting "Your Privacy Choices" located in the footer of this website, or by adjusting your Houzz Settings. Additionally, where provided for by applicable law, you may use the Global Privacy Control (GPC) an opt-out preference signal or universal opt-out mechanism to notify us of your privacy preference. We will recognize your opt-out preference, as opting-out of the sale or sharing of your personal information with third parties as defined by applicable law. We will apply your opt-out preference only to the browser or device used to signal your preference. When you login to our Platform, we will apply your opt-out preference to your account.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:5. Your Choices and Rights
sentence: Cookie Preferences

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:5. Your Choices and Rights
sentence: You may opt-out of certain cookies set via the Platform by visiting your Houzz settings or through your browser settings. Please see the "How I can control cookies" section of the Cookie Policy for more information.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:5. Your Choices and Rights
sentence: Complaints

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:5. Your Choices and Rights
sentence: If you would like to raise a concern about our use of your personal information, please contact us as described in the Contact Us section. We respond to all requests we receive from individuals wishing to exercise their data protection or privacy rights in accordance with applicable privacy and data protection laws. We may also ask you to verify your identity to help us respond to your request securely and efficiently. Depending on the laws in your local jurisdiction, you may be able to appeal decisions made regarding your rights. For individuals in Europe, the United Kingdom, and Switzerland, please see the "International Transfer" section of this Privacy Policy for additional information regarding your rights.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:6. Data Security and Retention
sentence: We use reasonable measures to protect your personal information from loss, misuse, unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, and destruction, taking into account the risks involved in the processing and the nature of the personal information.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:6. Data Security and Retention
sentence: We will keep your personal information for only as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which we are processing your personal information unless the law permits or requires us to retain your personal information longer. For example, we may need to keep your personal information to provide services on our Platform or to defend future legal claims. We also will retain de-identified information after your account has been deleted. Personal information you have shared with others may remain visible after your account has been deactivated, deleted or after the information has been removed from your own profile or account. Please note that copies of information that you have updated, modified, or deleted may continue to reside in our systems for a period of time, and we may maintain copies of this information as part of our business records.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:7. Children
sentence: Our Platform is intended for general audiences and is not directed to children under

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:7. Children
sentence: We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:7. Children
sentence: In the event that we learn that we have collected personal information from a child under age 18, we will take reasonable steps to delete that information. If you become aware or believe that a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us as provided in the Contact Us section.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:8. Updates to this Privacy Policy
sentence: We may revise this Privacy Policy from time to time. The most current version of our Privacy Policy will govern our use of information about you. If we make material changes to our Privacy Policy, we will notify you by email or by posting a notice on our Platform or by other means, to offer you an opportunity to review the changes before they become effective. By continuing to access or use our Platform after those changes become effective, you are subject to the revised Privacy Policy.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:9. Contact Us
sentence: If you have questions or comments about this Privacy Policy (including about the manner in which we or our service providers treat your personal information), you may contact us in the following ways: If you are an Ivy user, please email us at support@ivy.co;

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:9. Contact Us
sentence: If you have questions or comments about this Privacy Policy (including about the manner in which we or our service providers treat your personal information), you may contact us in the following ways: If you are a ConX user, please email us at conx-privacy@houzz.com;

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:9. Contact Us
sentence: If you have questions or comments about this Privacy Policy (including about the manner in which we or our service providers treat your personal information), you may contact us in the following ways: if you are a Houzz user and a resident of the European Economic Area, please email us at EUprivacy@houzz.com;

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:9. Contact Us
sentence: If you have questions or comments about this Privacy Policy (including about the manner in which we or our service providers treat your personal information), you may contact us in the following ways: all other Houzz users, please email us at privacy@houzz.com.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:9. Contact Us
sentence: You may also reach our Privacy team by mailing us at our address at Houzz Inc., 8605 Santa Monica Blvd., #90918, West Hollywood, CA 90069-4109, USA, Attn: Privacy.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:10. International Transfers of Personal Information
sentence: We may transfer your personal information to our affiliates, third-party partners, and service providers who are located around the world. When we transfer your information to countries that may not have equivalent privacy and data protection rules to the laws of your country, we take measures to comply with the applicable data protection laws related to our transfer. If you are located in the European Economic Area (“EEA”), the United Kingdom (“UK”) or Switzerland, where applicable law requires a transfer mechanism, we ensure that one or more of the following legal frameworks is in place: (a) we comply with the EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework to receive personal data transfers from the European Union/European Economic Area to the U.S. (see “Data Privacy Framework Notice”), (b) the recipient is based in a jurisdiction that the European Commission has decided maintains an adequate level of protection for personal data, or (c) the recipient has enacted appropriate safeguards under Article 46 of the GDPR (for example Binding Corporate Rules or Standard Contractual Clauses).

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:10. International Transfers of Personal Information > H3:Data Privacy Framework Notice
sentence: Houzz Inc. complies with the EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework (EU-U.S. DPF), the UK Extension to the EU-U.S. DPF, and the Swiss-U.S. Data Privacy Framework (Swiss-U.S. DPF) (collectively, the “DPF”) as set forth by the U.S. Department of Commerce. We have self-certified our commitment to comply with the DPF Principles with respect to personal information we transfer to the United States from the EEA, the UK, and Switzerland. If there is ever any conflict between the terms in this Privacy Policy and the DPF Principles, the DPF Principles will govern. Our commitments under the DPF Principles are subject to the investigatory and enforcement powers of the U.S. Federal Trade Commission. To learn more about the DPF program, and to view our certification, please visit https://www.dataprivacyframework.gov/.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:10. International Transfers of Personal Information > H3:Access, Choice, and Onward Transfers
sentence: We describe the types of personal information we receive in the U.S., as well as the purposes for which we collect and use it, in the Collection of Information and Use of Information Sections of this Privacy Policy. If you are located in the EU, UK or Switzerland, you have the right to request access to the personal information that we hold about you and request that we correct, amend or delete your personal information if it is inaccurate or processed in violation of the DPF Principles. We will give you an opportunity to opt out where personal information we collect will be used for a purpose that is materially different from those set out in this Privacy Policy.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:10. International Transfers of Personal Information > H3:Access, Choice, and Onward Transfers
sentence: We comply with the DPF Principles for all onward transfers of personal information from the EEA, UK, and Switzerland, including the onward transfer liability provisions. You can read more about how we share your personal information and the purposes for which we do so, in the Sharing Your Information Section of this Privacy Policy. Houzz may be liable in accordance with the DPF Principles for onward transfers of personal data governed by the DPF program to third parties processing personal data on our behalf. Under certain circumstances, we may be required to disclose your personal information in response to lawful requests by public authorities, including to meet national security or law enforcement requirements. If you would like to exercise any of your rights, or otherwise wish to limit the use or disclosure of your personal information in accordance with the DPF Principles, please contact us via the contact details set out below.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:10. International Transfers of Personal Information > H3:Accountability and Redress
sentence: If you have a question or complaint you believe to be within the scope of our DPF certification, please contact us first at privacy@houzz.com to resolve your concern. We will respond and attempt to resolve your concern within 45 days.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:10. International Transfers of Personal Information > H3:Accountability and Redress
sentence: In the event we are unable to resolve your concerns, you can contact our U.S.-based third-party dispute resolution provider (JAMS) at no cost to you, by visiting this link. Under certain conditions, more fully described in Annex I on the DPF website, you may be entitled to invoke binding arbitration when certain dispute resolution options do not satisfactorily resolve your concerns.

sentence: This section provides notice and specific information to consumers in California, Colorado, and Connecticut, Delaware, Iowa, Montana, Nebraska, New Hampshire, New Jersey, Oregon, Texas, Utah, Virginia, and any other U.S. state that may enact a comprehensive privacy law while this Privacy Policy is in effect (Covered States).

sentence: In addition to the rights described in the Your Choices and Rights section of this Privacy Policy, residents of Covered States have the following rights: Right to Know and Access. section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:11. California Privacy Statement, Notice at Collection, and Additional Information for Individuals in the United States
sentence: In addition to the rights described in the Your Choices and Rights section of this Privacy Policy, residents of Covered States have the following rights: Right to Correct. You can correct inaccurate information by updating your profile information in your account.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:11. California Privacy Statement, Notice at Collection, and Additional Information for Individuals in the United States
sentence: In addition to the rights described in the Your Choices and Rights section of this Privacy Policy, residents of Covered States have the following rights: Right to Delete. You may submit a verifiable request that we delete personal information we have collected from you.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:11. California Privacy Statement, Notice at Collection, and Additional Information for Individuals in the United States
sentence: In addition to the rights described in the Your Choices and Rights section of this Privacy Policy, residents of Covered States have the following rights: Right to Opt-out of Sales/Sharing. You have the right to opt out of “sharing” or “sales” of your information as further described below.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:11. California Privacy Statement, Notice at Collection, and Additional Information for Individuals in the United States
sentence: In addition to the rights described in the Your Choices and Rights section of this Privacy Policy, residents of Covered States have the following rights: Right to Equal Service. We will not discriminate against you if you exercise your privacy rights.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:11. California Privacy Statement, Notice at Collection, and Additional Information for Individuals in the United States
sentence: We share or sell information with third-party partners to display targeted advertising. If you reside in one of the Covered States, you can opt out of this processing by adjusting your Privacy Settings. If you reside in one of the Covered States that requires it, you can also opt out of this processing via Opt-out Preference Signal or Universal Opt-out Mechanism. If you opt-out with an Opt-out Preference Signal or Universal Opt-out Mechanism, we will apply your opt-out preference to only the browser or device used to signal your preference, and when you log into our Platform we will apply your opt-out preference to your account. If you reside in California, you can also opt out of this processing by visiting the “Your Privacy Choices” link located in the footer of our website.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:11. California Privacy Statement, Notice at Collection, and Additional Information for Individuals in the United States
sentence: We do not use or disclose sensitive personal information other than to provide the services or for other legally permissible purposes. If you reside in California, you may also, subject to certain exceptions, request that we provide information about how we have used and shared your personal information in the previous 12 months. Please submit these requests for information, as well as requests to access, correct, or delete your information, through this online support form, through your Privacy Settings, or by emailing us at privacy@houzz.com. Residents of Covered States may appeal Houzz's decision regarding their request by contacting us at privacy@houzz.com. If we deny your request, we will notify you and provide our reasons for the denial and instructions regarding the rights you may have under applicable laws to appeal the decision. If the appeal is denied, we will notify you of your rights under applicable laws to contact the Attorney General to submit a complaint. Consistent with applicable privacy laws, except to the extent reasonably related to the value of your personal information, we will not treat you differently for exercising your rights under these laws.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:11. California Privacy Statement, Notice at Collection, and Additional Information for Individuals in the United States
sentence: Your authorized agent may exercise your data protection rights on your behalf via this online support form or by emailing us at privacy@houzz.com. We may still require you to directly verify your identity and confirm that you have provided the authorized agent permission to submit the request. Please keep in mind that if we do not receive adequate proof that you are authorized to act on the consumer's behalf, we may deny the request. Whether you submit your request directly or through an authorized agent, generally, the only means Houzz has to verify your identity is for you to respond to a specific Houzz email from the Houzz support team from the email address associated with your Houzz account or to click a confirmation or similar button in a specific Houzz email from the email address associated with your Houzz account.

section: H1:PRIVACY POLICY > H2:11. California Privacy Statement, Notice at Collection, and Additional Information for Individuals in the United States
sentence: If you have any questions or concerns about our collection, use or disclosure of personal information, or if you believe we have not complied with this Privacy Policy or the Privacy Act 1988, please contact us as set out below. We will investigate the complaint and determine whether a breach has occurred and what action, if any, to take. We will take any privacy complaint seriously and will aim to resolve any such complaint in a timely and efficient manner. We expect our procedures will deal fairly and promptly with your complaint. However, if you remain dissatisfied, you can also make a formal complaint to an Officer at the Office of the Australian Information Commissioner (OAIC). Complaints must be in writing: Director of Compliance
